## Type of Contribution

- [ ] New locale
- [ ] Update to existing locale
- [ ] Fix (typos, grammar, consistency)
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Target Locale

Language (e.g. `pt-BR`):

## Game Version

This translation targets game version (e.g. `v7.0.1`):

## Description

Please describe what this pull request includes:

- Indicate percentage completed.
- If update: explain what was updated (new keys, revision, quality improvements, etc.).
- Any additional context reviewers should know.

## Locale Checklist

### General Requirements

- [ ] I've read and followed the contribution guide's recommendations.
- [ ] No keys are missing or extra compared to `en.json`.
- [ ] Untranslated lines remain in **English**.
- [ ] Keys are sorted in the same order as `en.json`.
- [ ] All placeholders (`<>`, `<1>`, `<color="grey">`, `<limb>`, etc.) are preserved exactly.
- [ ] I updated my locale's entry in `README.md` (state and contributors).

### Review & Quality

- [ ] The translation has been reviewed by at least one other native speaker.
